raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names prior work (Christiansen et al.) but does not articulate a sharp delta; the novelty claim is somewhat softened but still requires verification.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the Christiansen et al. reference and the empirical M-dwarf drop figure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits and some definitions (e.g., σ_phot) lack clear annotation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior work (Christiansen et al.) but does not articulate a sharp delta; the novelty claim is somewhat softened but still requires verification.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the Christiansen et al. reference and the empirical M-dwarf drop figure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits and some definitions (e.g., σ_phot) lack clear annotation.
